overview: Frozen Ghost is a Normal-class Undead monster found in Ice Abyss. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 120 HP, 22 physical damage, 100 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 3. 1 attack, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Ice Bolt at 150% ratio (330 base damage).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Curse Of The Screams
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Curse Of The Screams icon on your status bar.

status_effects_detail.name: Curse Of The Screams Deafness
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Curse Of The Screams Deafness icon on your status bar.

status_effects_detail.name: Frozen Field
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Frozen Field icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Fire, Light, Divine
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-3000), Light (-2000), Divine (-2000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Resists: Ice
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Ice (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
